Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Wow, he looks like a smart one... unlike his owner.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...And I love how the girl in that show has this mature vibe, y'know what I mean?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Whoa! Looks like this guy's had his fair share of fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Guess we should start heading home, then. See ya at school![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}You're surprisingly diligent, taking care of that little guy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I mean, I keep telling them that we're just childhood friends, but they won't stop prying about it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Guess I'll start heading home, then. See ya later![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh yeah, career consultation's tomorrow, isn't it? You know what you're gonna say?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}At the very least, tell 'em what they wanna hear. Ms. Toriumi's pretty scary when you piss her off...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Every time I fall asleep in class, she demands I apologize with a more and more expensive cake...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}So, what do you think? I mean, I'm pretty much set on going to college after graduating...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I heard some people aren't planning on doing anything at all. No college, no job...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}They just don't wanna put the effort in, I guess...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I know it's a pain, but I think they've got it all wrong.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I actually kinda like the way things are, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}...Heh, like you actually understand what I'm saying. Anyway, I'm gonna head out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}I'd better buy a cake just in case...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}{f 5 13 6 15 103}Well, well, if it isn't {f 4 2}-chan. You're quite a rascal, taking to the streets at this hour![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 4 25 25}Say, who's the little one? Don't tell me you're a father, {f 4 2}-chan![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Oh! Looking closely, he's just a dog, isn't he? Heheh, cute little thing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}...That's when I decided to make a tray to keep my glasses from being misplaced.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}But now I have no idea where I put the tray...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}I should take a cue from him and sprint my way home. With that, I bid you adieu![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Oh my gosh! That is such a cute dog![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}You are so lucky... I'm not allowed to have pets at my place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 2 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 2 25 25}Seriously, how many times does it have to happen!? This is exactly why his towels stink so bad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh, whoops... Sorry, I got in the way of your walk, didn't I?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I should start heading home anyway. See ya later, doggie![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Oh, right. You're walking your dog! Wait, have you been doing this every day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}So his name's Koromaru-kun? Wait, it's written with the kanji for tiger and wolf!? What a badass![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}Welcome back, little buddy! You can run around all by yourself, huh? Aren't you a clever boy?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Aw man, I actually need to get going... I'll see you later, you two![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}I was actually just thinking about you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}It's almost like you read my mind or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Aw, man, this is embarrassing. Did I have a big, stupid grin on my face?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}It just feels kinda... relieving when I'm with you, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}So when I'm alone, I think about you and make myself feel a little better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}Things have been pretty scary lately. Seriously, everyone's been talking like the world is ending![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}But in my mind... I'm okay, 'cause you're right there with me, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}Man, I bet that sounded pretty weird, huh? Haha...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}...I'm glad I was able to talk to you about this. I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}Glad I decided to get some fresh air. I've been feeling so stressed out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}It's been pretty scary lately, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}All I hear everywhere I go is people freaking out about the end of the world.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}I know they're just being paranoid, but... I gotta admit, it does kinda get to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 72 0 0}If anything happens, you better let me know. I'll come running in no time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 75 0 0}Aww, Koro-chan, you are too cute! Why don't you be my dog instead?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 76 0 0}Haha, just kidding. I'll see you later, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 78 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Aren't you freezing in this weather? You guys must be pretty dedicated.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 79 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Been seeing a lot of weirdos lately. I get it when people are stressed out in the spring, but why now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 81 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Haha, you're as peppy as ever, Koro-chan. Maybe all that warm fur makes a difference.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 106 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 82 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Brrr... It's so freaking cold! We're gonna get sick if we stay out here in this. Let's head back home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 87 0 0}I'm actually a little... afraid of dogs. I was attacked by one when I was little...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 88 0 0}It only knocked me over, but ever since then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 91 0 0}I... I'm still a little scared, but maybe I'll be okay with this one...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 92 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Um, I'm sorry for taking up so much of your time... I'll see you at school, then![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 95 0 0}...I was hoping I could slowly acclimate myself to being around dogs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 96 0 0}It doesn't look like Koromaru-kun is the type that would bite people...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 98 0 0}I'd like to make friends with him. Maybe I'll bring some treats next time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 99 0 0}Goodness, I'm sorry to interrupt your walk! If you'll excuse me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 100 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}{f 5 13 9 15 109}Oh, good evening, {f 4 1}-san. It's nice to see you like this again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 103 0 0}It's a shame. I like Kyoto, but moreover... well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 107 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}You'll be staying behind as well, won't you, Koromaru-kun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 108 0 0}Um... If you don't mind, I'd love to hear how the trip was once you return.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 110 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}{f 5 13 9 15 109}Oh, good evening, {f 4 1}-san. It's nice to see you like this again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 111 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}That reminds me... Next week is your school trip, isn't it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 112 0 0}First-years don't get to go... I'm a little envious that you'll get to see Kyoto.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 113 0 0}I'd like to visit that shrine with all the red torii gates.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 115 0 0}You'll be staying behind as well, won't you, Koromaru-kun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 116 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Hehe... When {f 4 1}-san gets back from Kyoto, let's have him tell us all about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 117 0 0}Please, enjoy your trip to the fullest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 119 0 0}Hehe... It's a little embarrassing running into you at night like this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 121 0 0}But I think, at the same time, it helps me be a little braver...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 122 0 0}Um... I may be a little younger than you, and perhaps not the most reliable...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 123 0 0}But if you ever find yourself in need, I'm here to lend you a helping hand.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 125 0 0}Sorry if that was sudden. Things have been strange lately, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 126 0 0}Hehe... Maybe all those TV programs are starting to influence me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 128 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}You're always so full of energy, Koromaru-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 129 0 0}Well, even if it was just coincidence that we happened to cross paths tonight... I'm glad.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 130 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I would've liked to talk a bit longer, but... it's getting late. We should start heading back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 132 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Do you always take walks around this time?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 133 0 0}I didn't expect Koromaru-kun to be so nocturnal...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 134 0 0}Things have been very strange lately...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 136 0 0}How are things for you, {f 4 1}-san? Is everything all right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 137 0 0}If there's ever anything you need help with... please don't hesitate to tell me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 138 0 0}I may be a little younger than you, and perhaps not the most reliable...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 139 0 0}But if you ever find yourself in need, I'll be here to lend you a helping hand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 141 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Welcome back. You're always so full of energy, Koromaru-kun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 142 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}But I suppose it's getting a little cold. Why don't we start heading back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 144 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}{f 5 13 9 15 109}Oh, good evening. Hehe, we happen to run into each other a lot, don't we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 145 0 0}I stopped by the bookstore and didn't realize it had gotten so late...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 146 0 0}It's a bit scary being out at this hour... There have been more and more strange people around lately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 148 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Hehe... I suppose with Koromaru-kun around, we won't have to worry about walking alone at night, will we?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 149 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Oh, look at the time... I think we should start heading back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 151 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Hey, I didn't know you had a dog. Is that a Shiba?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 152 0 0}That white fur is really nice. Almost makes him look mystical or something, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 154 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Oh man, he just looks so cool! I wonder how soft he is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 3 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 155 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 3 25 25}Well, I don't want to make him uncomfortable or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 156 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Hey, do you think I could try petting him next time? I'll study up the proper way to do it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 158 0 0}By the way, is it all right for you to be out at this hour?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 160 0 0}A lot of people have been acting strange these days. I wonder if it's... some kind of new disease.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 161 0 0}Nobody knows the cause or how to prevent it... I really hope it calms down soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 163 0 0}Oh, sorry... I didn't mean to keep you so long.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 164 0 0}Well, I'm going to head home. You guys be careful on your way back, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 166 0 0}Ah, walking the dog, huh? I didn't know you had one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 167 0 0}We used to have a dog, too. Man, that brings back memories...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 169 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Haha, he's a lively one, isn't he? I bet running alongside this little guy would be great practice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 171 0 0}{f 5 13 18 15 115}Oh, hey {f 4 1}. That's right, you walk your dog around this time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 172 0 0}I'm just out for a light run. Felt like I needed a little more after club practice.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_096_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 173 0 0}...It's kinda chilly just standing around. Wanna do some stair laps over there?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_098_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 1 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 175 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Oh, welcome back. You've got some pretty good form, there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 115 0 6 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 176 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}I should get back to my run. I'll see you later![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_100_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 179 0 0}Hmm, looking at you two... I can kinda see the resemblance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 180 0 0}Remember Hayase? Apparently, the guy moved.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 181 0 0}Wasn't expecting that... But I guess we'll see him around as long as we keep doing track.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_103_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 1 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 183 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 1 25 25}Whoa, this guy's a fast runner! Did he learn that from you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 184 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}...Oh, crap! I was supposed to be doing errands! Uh, gotta go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 186 0 0}{f 4 23 0 100 0 25 25}Do you always walk this route? I would have thought you'd change it up now and then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 187 0 0}...I heard there's a guy who runs insanely fast around here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 188 0 0}I've been roaming around hoping to see what's up, but I haven't found a trace of him.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 190 0 0}Oh, this guy's back. Man, he's a fast one, too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 105 0 101 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 191 0 0}Well, I'd better get going. I'll see you later, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Koromaru and I returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
